competitor_changes: multi-currency invoicing (80+ currencies including EUR, GBP, USD native)
current_tool_status: reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows takes 8–12 minutes; causes month-end bottleneck
no native multi-currency — EUR invoices require manual conversion and journal entries
revenue recognition module not IFRS 15 compliant — workaround in use

notes: data residency roadmap for EU clients not confirmed
